question.label: Excellent work examples
question.name: What examples of excellent junior-level work feel missing to you right now?
question.description: Drills into his request for clearer examples so the missing standard becomes concrete.

answer: When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.

assessment.note: He describes broad reviews leaving him unsure what to change first — strong clarity deficit, with mild strain from not knowing where to focus.

history.answer_excerpt: When reviews are broad, I am not sure what to change first.
I can name wins, but I am not always sure they match the team bar.
Feedback has helped, though I still miss consistency under time pressure.
I want clearer examples of what excellent junior-level work looks like here.
